name: Bug Investigation
description: Systematic bug investigation: reproduce, locate root cause, propose fix, verify

steps.task: Gather all available context: error messages, logs, reproduction steps, affected users
Search knowledge graph for related past bugs, fixes, and relevant architecture decisions
Attempt to reproduce the bug with a minimal test case
Trace the bug to its root cause using the reproduction and historical context
Implement the fix for the root cause
Verify the fix resolves the bug and doesn't introduce regressions
